issue.title: [web] Redesign frontend to match DESIGN.md
issue.goal: Refactor the frontend to follow the rules and visual language defined in `DESIGN.md`. Align layout, typography, spacing, color usage, component shapes, and interactive states with the new design system.
acceptanceCriteria: The frontend UI matches `DESIGN.md` for core layout, color, typography, and component styling.
Existing green-accent usage is removed or replaced where it conflicts with `DESIGN.md`.

description: The current frontend needs to be reworked to match the new `DESIGN.md` system. The work should cover the main app surfaces, component styles, and brand color usage so the UI is consistent with the documented purple-based visual language.
